name: Shared onboarded company for read-only + create-isolated-entity tests
description:
Single onboarded react_sdk_demo_company_onboarded company shared across all non-canary tests in every domain. Hosts read-only specs (payroll lifecycle, employee list, contractor roster) plus specs that create uniquely-named entities (time-off policies with timestamped names). The combined decoration set covers every entity contract any RO spec needs:

- HQ location for employee work-address picker and time-off employee enrollment
- Biweekly pay schedule for payroll landing / blockers / off-cycle / transition lifecycle specs and weekly-cadence (which only asserts payroll landing UI)
- One salaried alice employee for employee-list and time-off enrollment specs
- Two contractors (Charlie Individual + Acme Consulting LLC business) for contractor-business, contractor-mixed-roster, and contractor-onboarding-edit-lifecycle specs. The 'Acme Consulting' business name is a fixture key in those specs — don't rename without updating them.

This company is NOT used by any canary suite — those mutate state across tests and need their own isolated onboarded company (see shared/onboarded-canary). The full health gate (requireOnboardedCompany + requireOnboardedEmployees + requireSignatory + requireNoBlockers) runs at e2e-setup time so every test that uses this company is guaranteed a payroll-ready state.
